message:
fix(lab): Add RNG-based tie-breaking for deterministic scheduling variance

Adds pop_with_rng_hint() to PriorityScheduler that varies task selection
among equal-priority tasks using the RNG hint value. LabRuntime now uses
this method to ensure different seeds produce different task orderings.

Fixes: test_lab_different_seeds_different_results
Closes: bd-3ivp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
